name: changelog-generator
description: Auto-generate changelog from git commits using conventional commits.
instruction:
When user asks for changelog:
1. Run `git log --oneline` to get commits
2. Group by type: Features (feat:), Fixes (fix:), Docs (docs:), etc.
3. Generate markdown changelog
4. Format: ## [version] - date
   ### Added/Changed/Fixed
   - commit message
